In recent New York City news, a 69-year-old woman was killed in a hit-and-run, two teenage girls were shot in Brooklyn, and the NYU faculty strike continues as negotiations stall; meanwhile, Mayor Mamdani faces challenges over rental assistance and the city prepares for a crucial budget deadline.

### Risks & Alerts

- 69-year-old woman dead after apparent hit and run near Midtown East, New York City. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Teen girls aged 14 and 16 wounded in shooting outside Brooklyn McDonald's. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxQbWpZX21uMVpvS1UtRDJmaUN1MVVTU05RRFc2bWUzMHpyWmR1THV2YUc1akR6N0lvNlU0VWNMSm53TS1wUElNOWFBbnhEUFlHTjdNUkNRMnhaQzBiS0xycjU1OTVfZlRkSzB3Tk9KbEdENGlvdE5XM2x6dUI0cE93eEFUNEEzNG5CWjRZd0V1ZWUzZmRxMXQ0UU8xNzhIalZvZ2czVDEyZHdKUkQwRGRURXhR?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- Mamdani opposes rental assistance expansion, continuing conflict with NYC Council. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxPSWZzN2NqYzk4akpTcU5DUE03UjBoUjU4N1V6ZmxaWnQyQ0l0bGY5dzNMREJxc205czBBQXVVTEVKX3FLQ01MZnQ4UmxiNDY4YmdxdlF6cVBhMkJBVHRQdGVzR2FDMEJMNmdvM3hSU2VVRFRHVVdDcDdVWDRFam9Xb2FWQzZmM0x0TXpSb1N4Z3NtLUpnSjhiTGEtU3JCUkpfazg0aE9ILTVOXzZXYUE?oc=5)
- NYU faculty strike continues as union and university reach impasse on wages. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)
- Trump-appointed judge keeps city council staffer in ICE detention. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- New York's state budget is due April 1; key sticking points include education and housing funding. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxPbVdnMkFpZGJxMVhsenhsaUMwRlphbWFJcS0xaFJabzhiX2U2UEVDSUdFOWFKdnF6aVgxaG05X0dIUUFUTHUwUUIzc1dEYUdGTzdtSVFPVVZ6bmZsRkxjOWJJUXcyeEd0T0c5c2NFdVZUNmxub3FWaFpyelJoVldrRHF3ZDlzWjhvM3VTUXN0UU1Xem4zVkRYLXlkYUl5Zw?oc=5)

- NYC Mayor Mamdani meets with Staten Island child care providers in a closed meeting. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Opportunities & Welfare

- Thousands of New Yorkers at risk of losing rent funds with no solution in sight.
